description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves held together by four prominent black metal hoops. The wood has a natural, light brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The top and bottom are flat and appear to be made from the same wood as the staves, tightly fitted within the metal bands. The barrel is fully enclosed, with no visible openings or spouts, and there are no handles or additional attachments. The surface is matte and slightly rough, typical of untreated or lightly finished wood. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on the exterior.
description: A rustic, light brown wooden barrel with black metal hoops and a bulging cylindrical shape, fully enclosed with no handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bulging wooden staves and four black metal hoops, with the flat top surface visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curvature of the barrel and the even spacing of the metal hoops, with no visible openings or handles.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and the secure fit of the top within the hoops.
description_view_3: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same wooden staves and metal hoops, with the flat top and bottom visible.
